title: verba in Telegram: Interactive Bot & Automated Channel
lede: Introducing the official Telegram bot and channel for the verba corpus. Search proverbs by keyword or meaning, browse categories, and share wisdom directly in any chat.

title: Open Data: How to Reuse the Corpus
lede: For researchers and developers — explore download formats, REST API specifications, Croissant dataset metadata, and citation guidelines for the verba corpus.

title: Five Collections: Where the Proverbs Come From
lede: The history of the five classic sources that comprise the verba corpus, from Ilkevych to Mlodzynskyi, along with notes on digital OCR processing.
